name: AvbSetVerbosity
title: AvbSetVerbosity
description: Sets the verbosity level of AVB IL messages in the Write Window.

parameters.name: verbosity
parameters.description: Verbosity level: 0: Silent - do not write messages to the Write Window 1: Error - write only error messages (default) 2: Warning - write warning and error messages 3: Information - write information, warning and error messages

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
